title: Art and Craft Salad Bowl 22.5 cm-2200cc Alinda
features: International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: This excellent multipurpose bowl is the perfect fit in any kitchen, restaurant and cafes. The base of the Lav Alinda bowl has been molded solid and thick, a beautiful creation. This product is robust and a reliable long-lasting piece of glassware. Perfect for serving fruit, pasta, salad, cake and desserts. A large glass bowl is dishwasher safe and easy to use. Comes with original boxing high quality made in Turkey. Volume 2200cc Approx Height: 92mm Approx Diameter: 22cm Approx Material: Glass
